revision.text: {{Character | name = James T. Kirk | rank = Captain | assignment = USS Enterprise }} '''James Tiberius Kirk''' was a celebrated [[Starfleet]] officer. He commanded the [[USS Enterprise (NCC-1701)]]. Kirk was born in [[Riverside, Iowa]].

{{Starship | name = USS Enterprise | class = Constitution | registry = NCC-1701 }} The '''USS Enterprise''' was a Federation [[Constitution-class]] heavy cruiser. It was commanded by [[Christopher Pike]] and later [[James T. Kirk]].
